# Mnemosyne

> A dark-mode second brain: a live, force-directed knowledge graph of notes, code, blogs, music, and art, with AI-powered semantic search.

Mnemosyne visualizes the connections between Cornelius A. Pratt's projects, sites, and creative work as an interactive 2D/3D constellation. It combines fuzzy search, semantic (embedding-based) search, focus mode, particle-flow links, and per-node notes powered by Lovable Cloud.

## Pages

- [Home / Graph](/): The main 2D/3D knowledge graph explorer.
- [AbSoulutely CAPtivating](/absoulutelycaptivating): The AbSoulutely CAPtivating creative system — roles, tools, and the Define → Translate → Build → Launch flow.
